description.en: List all environments (e.g., production, staging) for a specific application.
description.de: Listet alle Umgebungen (z.B. Produktion, Staging) für eine bestimmte Applikation auf.

vars.API_KEY: env:LARAVEL_CLOUD_TOKEN|Get your API token from Organization Settings in Laravel Cloud

description.en: The ID or slug of the application.

output.ENVIRONMENTS: transform:(out) => { return Array.isArray(out.data) ? out.data.map(item => ({ id: item.id, name: item.attributes.name, slug: item.attributes.slug, status: item.attributes.status })) : []; }
